arts.sum: Juventus' pursuit of defensive reinforcements continues, with David Hancko emerging as the preferred choice for both the club's management and coach Thiago Motta. arts.sum: As Juventus and AC Milan prepare to face each other in the Supercoppa Italiana semi-final at the King Saud University Stadium in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, their rivalry extends beyond the pitch and into the transfer market.
